# Talent Agency / Model Agency Site — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P3-talent-agency-talent-agency-site
**Vertical slug:** talent-agency
**VN-ID:** VN-CRE-002
**Niche family:** NF-CRE-TAL (standalone)
**Family role:** standalone
**Research date:** 2026-04-26

## 1. Nigerian Business Reality
Nigeria's talent management industry serves models (Lagos Fashion Week, GTBank Fashion Weekend), OAPs, MCs, brand ambassadors, actors (Nollywood), and content creators. Key agencies include Beth Model Management, Page Modelling Agency, and smaller boutique operations. APCON (Advertising Practitioners Council of Nigeria) compliance governs commercial work. Brand ambassador deals are primary revenue. WhatsApp is used for all booking enquiries.

## 2. Target Audience Profile
- **Funmi, 24, aspiring model**: Wants representation. Checks roster quality, agency credentials, and submission process. Submits via WhatsApp.
- **Damilola, 38, brand manager at FMCG**: Needs a face for a campaign. Browses talent portfolio, shortlists, and sends a WhatsApp brief.
- **Chidi, 30, event planner**: Needs an MC or celebrity appearance. Checks talent profiles, past events, and enquires via WhatsApp.

## 3. Recommended Website Structure
- **Home**: Hero (agency name, specialty), featured talent carousel, WhatsApp booking CTA, trust strip (APCON, CAC, past clients)
- **About**: Agency story, booking process, talent categories, APCON compliance, CAC reg
- **Services (Talent Roster)**: Talent profiles grid (photo, name, category, stats), submission CTA
- **Contact**: WhatsApp booking brief, talent submission form (NDPR-compliant), office address

## 4. Content Tone & Voice
Aspirational, professional, and glamour-adjacent. "Nigeria's Premier Talent", "APCON Compliant", "Trusted by Top Brands" language. Reference Lagos Fashion Week, GTBank Fashion Weekend, Afrobeats culture. Primary CTA: "Book a Talent". Secondary: "Submit Your Portfolio".

## 5. Trust Signal Inventory
- APCON compliance badge
- CAC registration
- Past brand partner logos (Nigerian brands: GTBank, Dangote, MTN)
- Lagos Fashion Week participation
- Talent roster social media following totals
- NDPR compliance for talent data

## 6. Image Direction (5-7 Specific Concepts)
1. Model on runway — Lagos Fashion Week, colourful Nigerian fabrics
2. Agency CEO with talent — professional office, Lagos Island
3. Brand shoot — talent in branded setting, FMCG product
4. Nollywood actor headshot — professional lighting, Nigerian
5. MC/OAP at corporate event — branded backdrop, speaking into mic
6. Portfolio collage — diverse Nigerian talent, multiple looks
7. Agency award night — best talent agency plaque, formal event

## 7. Regulatory Compliance Checklist
- [ ] APCON compliance disclosed
- [ ] CAC registration displayed
- [ ] Talent data NDPR consent
- [ ] Booking terms and cancellation policy
- [ ] Minor talent requires guardian consent clause

## 8. Nigeria-First Compliance Checklist
- [x] WhatsApp booking CTA on home and contact pages
- [x] Nigerian talent names and profiles
- [x] Nigerian brand partner references
- [x] APCON trust signal
- [x] Lagos Fashion Week/GTBank Weekend context
- [x] Mobile-first layout
- [x] esc() on all inputs
- [x] NDPR on talent submission form
